calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Off Calendar

Application For Judgment Establishing Title To Real Property Under The Destroyed Records Relief Law [Ccp § 751 Et. Seq.]
Off Calendar Mar-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Lee P. Bardellini, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 181 FREMONT STREET, LLC., a Delaware Limited Liability Company ("181 FREMONT" or "PLAINTIFF").

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) All Persons Unknown Claiming Any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest int he Property Described in this Complaint Adverse to Plaintiffs' Title, or Any Cloud on Plaintiffs' Title Thereto. All Persons Unknown Claiming Any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the Property Described in this Complaint Adverse to Plaintiffs' Title, or Any Cloud on Plaintiffs' Title Thereto.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.
Ben Ron and Phil Verinsky sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s). See scanned Judgment and Findings of Fact, Conclusions of Law and Court. See scanned Judgment.
